transcript: Speaker A (AI): English शिकण्याचा पहिला rule काय आहे? [What is the first rule of learning English?] Speaker B (Human): कोणता? [Which one?] Speaker A (AI): English वापरणं, फक्त बोलायची practice करा. [Using English, just practice speaking.] Speaker B (Human): पण कोणासोबत practice करू? [But with whom should I practice?] Speaker A (AI): MySivi सोबत. तुमचं वय किती आहे? [With MySivi. How old are you?] Speaker B (Human): I have 22 years. Speaker A (AI): I have 22 years नाही, I am 22 years old असं म्हणायचं. [Not 'I have 22 years', say 'I am 22 years old'.] Speaker B (Human): Oh, I am 22 years old. Speaker A (AI): Perfect! आता सांग तू कुठून आहेस? [Perfect! Now tell me where are you from?] Speaker B (Human): I am from Maharashtra. Speaker A (AI): Very good! Speaker B (Human): पण माझं English अजूनही weak आहे. [But my English is still weak.] Speaker A (AI): MySivi चा AI teacher तुझ्या चुका लगेच correct करतो आणि तुला confidence ने English बोलायला शिकवतो. आजच MySivi app install करा आणि फक्त १ रुपयाच्या trial मध्ये तुमची English learning journey सुरू करा. [MySivi's AI teacher corrects your mistakes instantly and teaches you to speak English with confidence. Install the MySivi app today and start your English learning journey with just a 1 rupee trial.]
on_screen_text: English शिकण्याचा [Learning English] पहिला rule काय [What is the first rule] कोणता [Which one] English वापरणं [Using English] practice करा [Practice] पण कोणासोबत [But with whom] practice करू [Should I practice] MySivi सोबत [With MySivi] तुमचं वय किती [How old are you] I have 22 years I am 22 years old असं म्हणायचं [Say like this] Perfect आता सांग [Perfect, now tell] तू कुठून आहेस [Where are you from] I am from Maharashtra Very good पण माझं [Very good, but my] English अजूनही [English is still] weak आहे [weak] ARYA AI: Hello, Tejas! I'm so glad to meet you! How can I assist you in improving your English today? Would you like... Start talking to interrupt ARYA आणि तुला confidence [And you confidence] शिकवतो आजच MySivi [Teaches, today itself MySivi] app install करा [Install app] आणि फक्त १ रुपयाच्या [And just for 1 rupee] trial मध्ये तुमची [In trial, your] English learning [English learning] journey सुरू करा [Start journey] MySivi Premium: 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access.
summary: An AI avatar and a human interact in a split-screen format to demonstrate how the MySivi app helps users practice English. The AI avatar corrects the human's grammatical mistake in real-time, showcasing the app's instant feedback feature. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the app and start a 3-day premium trial for just 1 rupee.
